_comment: Permissions fragment merged into the project's .claude/settings.json by BundleInstaller. Entries are added to the user's existing allow/deny arrays; never overwriting other entries. Edit this file in the bundle source to change defaults for new installs; users can hand-edit their own .claude/settings.json post-install without losing the bundle's contributions on a re-apply.
_hooks_comment: PreToolUse(Edit|Write) ownership guard (SP-tgpwbm / TEP-tgpupa): refuses an edit to a file the active slice does not own, per the ownership arbiter. Fail-open when the feature isn't engaged. Merged into the project's .claude/settings.json hooks by BundleInstaller (de-duplicating, never clobbering other hooks).
